summary: UX improvements for dataset context verified. All main features working: (1) Dataset name badge in header shows correctly when loading sample datasets, (2) Badge updates on dataset switch, (3) Toast notification 'Previous analysis saved to History' appears when switching datasets, (4) History entries show dataset name with Database icon for newly saved analyses, (5) Better naming format 'Dataset — Target — Date' for saved analyses.

dataset_badge_in_header.location: Header bar next to subtitle text
dataset_badge_in_header.notes: Shows dataset name with Database icon in a pill/badge format

badge_updates_on_switch.notes: Badge correctly changes from 'Loan Approval' to 'House Prices' when switching datasets

toast_on_auto_save.notes: Toast appears in top-right corner when switching datasets with existing analysis

history_shows_dataset_name.notes: New entries show dataset name with Database icon. Older entries show 'Uploaded CSV' (saved before fix)

state_reset_on_switch.notes: All analysis state (models, SHAP, predictions, target column) properly resets when loading new dataset

context_for_next_testing_agent: UX improvements for dataset context verified. Key data-testids: current-dataset-badge (header badge), sample-dataset-0 (Loan Approval), sample-dataset-1 (House Prices), target-column-select, start-training-btn, history-item-{n}, load-snapshot-{n}. Toast uses sonner library. Training is client-side JavaScript (15-35 seconds). The handleCsvTextChange function properly resets all state and shows toast when switching datasets. History entries now show dataset_name field with Database icon for newly saved analyses.
